positive: Minimalist geometric owl silhouette sitting on a crescent moon, surrounded by stylized starry constellations and celestial vines. Flat graphic design style, high contrast black and white linework, deep navy blue and muted gold color accents, perfect for screen printing on apparel. Central composition, clean lines, vector illustration quality, ethereal and mystical mood. Studio lighting, photorealistic rendering of the pattern texture, high detail, symmetrical balance.
negative: photorealism, gradient, blur, grain, watermark, text, logos, signatures, artifacts, poor composition, low quality, noise, bad anatomy, messy lines, extra limbs
